description: Draft research template for Apis mellifera worker right forewing shape analysis. The ordinal order LM01-LM19 follows the published honey bee forewing landmark system used by Oleksa et al. (2023), DOI 10.1093/gigascience/giad019, and the referenced 19-landmark lineage dataset DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7567336. Keep this template in draft status until an administrator explicitly approves the anatomical definitions for production use.

landmarks.label: LM01
landmarks.description: Published Apis forewing fixed venation landmark 1 in the Oleksa/Tofilski 19-point ordinal sequence.
